title: lycopodium × brucei
intro: Lycopodium × brucei is a hybrid plant species of the club moss genus Lycopodium, resulting from a cross between Lycopodium clavatum and Lycopodium selago. Lycopodium × brucei is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the nervous system and improve respiratory function. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Lycopodium × brucei is often used in the form of dried powder or tincture, and can be administered orally or topically to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
